name: githooks
author: Cod-e-Codes
description: Git repository management and status updates

commands.name: git-status
commands.description: Show git status of current directory

commands.name: git-branch
commands.description: Show current git branch and available branches

commands.name: git-diff
commands.description: Show git diff of uncommitted changes

commands.name: git-watch
commands.description: Watch a repository for changes (admin only)
